curation_notes: The patch adds Send trait bounds to the unsafe Send impl for Future<T, U> in src/lib.rs. The pre-assigned class race-condition (CWE-362) is correct: the missing bounds allow non-Send types to cross thread boundaries via Future, enabling data races. The Sync impl also lacks bounds but is not addressed in this patch commit. Only one source file (src/lib.rs) was modified; not a noisy patch. No sibling files exist in this single-file crate.
